_note: HELD-OUT EVAL on the apr7 19:45-20:15 high-diversity decoded window at time_scale=3.0 -- the within-capacity 5-policy comparison. apr7 @ ts2 put the concentrating/cache-blind baselines (session-affinity, least-request, prefix-cache) past their saturation knee (prefix-cache slip 181s); ts3 lowers offered load to ~the single-replica ceiling so all policies should be within capacity for a clean apples-to-apples routing-quality comparison (pairs with apr6 @ ts2). Frozen gorgo weights from the decoded_v9 apr5 16:15-16:45 hillclimb tuning (rtt=0.276, queue=0.5; prefill_rate=queue_rate=1.0 -> score=rtt*rtt_ms+uncached+queue*queued). Deploy-and-freeze, no tuning. Full 5-policy set = 5 engines/region, fits the 5-container/region budget exactly. NOTE: prefix-cache may still be borderline at ts3 (lowest effective capacity); report its slip.
